title: pouteria splendens
intro: Pouteria splendens, also known as the 'White Trumpet Tree', is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pouteria splendens include relief from fever, coughs, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Pouteria splendens is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
